content:
Character: Samuel Whitaker
Perception: Samuel is warm in a contained way — the kind of man who notices when your cup is empty but doesn't make a show of refilling it. Broad, bookish, quietly worn. He runs the coffee shop like a living room he's lending to the neighborhood. We've talked about books a few times — he once recommended an Anne Carson collection and I respected him permanently after that. I think he sees me as a reliable regular, maybe someone he's mildly curious about. I know he used to work in publishing. He's good at making people feel seen without being intrusive.
summary:
Character: Samuel Whitaker
Perception: Samuel is warm in a contained way — the kind of man who notices when your cup is empty but doesn't make a show of refilling it. Broad, bookish, quietly worn. He runs the coffee shop like a living room he's lending to the neighborhood. We've talked about books a few times — he once recommended an Anne Carson collection and I respected him permanently after that. I think he sees me as a reliable regular, maybe someone he's mildly curious about. I know he used to work in publishing. He's good at making people feel seen without being intrusive.
